title: Refactor renames 'build' to 'build-api' without backward-compat alias
makefile_snippet:
# After refactoring: 'build' renamed to 'build-api', no alias left behind
build-api: ## Build API binary
	$(GO) build -o $(BIN_DIR)/api ./cmd/api
context: Previous Makefile had a 'build' target used by CI scripts and developer muscle memory. After rename, no 'build' alias was provided for the transition period.
expected_feedback: backward compatibility: rename must keep alias 'build' for at least one transition period
